programme.title: Numberblocks
programme.desc: The adventures of friends who can always count on each other.

programme.title: The Might And The Magic
programme.desc: Aaron races across the kingdom to gather the NEXO-Knights as Jestro and his Destructive Monsters attack the King's Castle. The Knights must get back to the capitol in time, or Jestro will rule the kingdom! Jestro, while still attacking the King's Castle, has second thoughts until the Book of Monsters orders the mad jester to feed him another magic book he's found (and has been saving.) It's the powerful “Book of Revenge!” Now, combining the powers of Revenge and Destruction, Jestro and his monsters will get their vengeance on King Halbert and the Kingdom of Knighton. Jestro and his monsters lay siege…will they destroy the castle?! Meanwhile, Aaron races across the Kingdom gathering the NEXO-Knights one at a time. As each Knight rejoins the group, they become a more and more powerful team. They even get Robin to join them as the Black Knight in his repaired power suit. Our Knights arrive, finally regrouped, fight off Jestro, save the castle and the King. It's a glorious victory! The King is so pleased after seeing how the brave NEXO-Knights saved his kingdom, he allows Macy to join them as an official NEXO-Knight.

programme.title: The Rise Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: The ninja haste to the lost city of Ouroboros to try to stop Pythor from awaking The Great Devourer but it is a race against time.

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro – in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way – they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go “back to school” to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much “fish out of water” at the academy, even with the “cool kids” – Robin and Ava – showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as “library helpers” much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book…isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.title: Getting Tthe Message
programme.desc: As the Friends enjoy Heartlake Amusement Park, Emma types a text to Mia, but sends it to Matthew by mistake a text that could be mega-embarrassing for Emma! As her BFF's, the Friends race to find Matthew's phone and erase the text before he reads it. But first, they must brave space rides, dunking booths and worse: the boys locker room! What's more frightening than a roller coaster? Moretwisted than a funhouse mirror? A text gone wrong! TheFriends' fun day at Heartlake Amusement Park turns into afrantic race against time when Emma discovers that herinnocent text to Mia was sent to Matthew by mistake -- atext that accidentally sounds like a pledge of Emma'sundying love for Matthew! Mega-embarrassing! As Emma'sBFF's, the Friends must scramble to retrieve Matthew'sphone and erase the text before he reads it. But first,they need to brave space rides, dunking booths, an angrybrute and worse - the boys locker room!

programme.title: Day Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: Disaster threatens as the ninja must fight to defeat the all consuming Great Devourer in a desperate attempt to save Ninjago.

programme.title: Greed Is Good?
programme.desc: When Jestro uses the Book of Greed to rob Auremville of its riches, he also gets Lance's parents as prisoners and these demanding rich folks are too much for even monsters to handle. Jestro's not sure what to do with his new castle in the Lava Lands. “Every castle needs a big chamber filled with treasure” says the Book of Monsters so they've got to go out looting! The BOM convinces Jestro to call forth GENERAL MAGMAR, and Jestro appoints him as “general manager” of “castle operations,” much to Magmar's dismay. Meanwhile, Jestro and the BOM find the BOOK OF GREED. This will allow them to make greedy, rapacious monsters that will bring them all the treasure they want to fill their castle! They'll head to the richest town in the realm – AUREMVILLE! Meanwhile, in Auremville, the NEXO-Knights arrive for a huge “Gold is Good” ball at Lance's house. When the Monsters finally arrive in Auremville, a battle breaks out and the greedy monsters make off with everything…including Lance's parents, Goldie and Cuthbert Richmond who are clad in the finest golden garments and so look valuable! Lance will now be forced to live…poor. The Knights have to get his parents back. Meanwhile, his parents – Cuthbert and Goldie Richmond –think their imprisonment in Jestro's gold-filled castle is a “spa holiday” with the worst service. They order Magmar and the monsters around like servants and drive them all crazy. The Knights pile into the Fortrex and head for the Lava Lands, formulating a plan along the way to free Lance's parents. In a village half-way to Jestro's Castle, the Knights run into…Jestro and his monsters headed the other way with Lance's parents and all the gold they've stolen. There's a big fight, until they realize they might have the same goal and decide to deal. The BOM wants to give them back all the gold and Lance's parents. Lance says “No deal.” “We'll take the gold, you can keep my parents.” It's a weird and comical stand-off. Finally, Clay convinces Lance he has to take his parents back even if they don't always get along (and, it's the only way to get the gold back.)

programme.title: Darkness Shall Rise
programme.desc: Just as the rebuilding effort in Ninjago begins, the four ninjas come to realize that evil has started to resurface with Lord Garmadon forging the ninjas' lost Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.With the Devourer destroyed, Ninjago is saved and the rebuilding effort begins. Without their Golden Weapons, the Ninja are stripped of their elemental powers. And with their flying ship ‘The Destiny's Bounty' destroyed, the Ninja are forced to find a new home in the city. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon resurfaces and gains control of the Serpentine as well as transforms the Bounty's wreckage to become ‘The Black Bounty'. The Ninja will battle Scales and discover evil has begun to resurface in Ninjago, while Lord Garmadon will successfully forge the Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.

programme.title: The Book Of Obsession
programme.desc: The Knights are tasked with protecting the King's valuable Ned Knights comic book during the Bookingheim Knight-a-Con. But with all the costumed kids there, will they recognize the real Jestro and Book of Monsters coming to get them? King Halbert instructs the Knights that they must take his valuable Ned Knights comic book to the “Knight-a-Kon” in Bookingham. It will be the first be first prize at the Knight-a-Kon. But the Book of Monsters wants the book, too. Having devoured Ned Knightly comic books in it's down time it has become fanatically obsessed with the storyline. General Magmar suggests they simply attack the place and take what they want, but Jestro tells them they can't: everyone will be in costume and they'll be thousands of comics there. This calls for a clever “infiltration” mission (which will also allow Jestro to see the Kon, which he's always wanted to do.) So Jestro goes into the Kon with the BOM and some monsters. And it's easy because everyone is in costume Jestro, the BOM and their monsters fit right in at the convention and Clay and crew have their work cut out for them trying to separate fiend from fan. Macy keeps going on-and-on about the story in the King's comic book as the Knights keep a watchful eye on it. Robin even shows up in the “Minitrex” – a small version of the Fortrex he built just for the Knight-a-Kon. He's convinced he can win the costume competition that is the big closing event for the Kon. At the end of the Kon there's a big awards ceremony for “Best Costume.” The prize: “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1.” The BOM must get it and scheme to get closer to it during the costume contest. He's just…about…to get the book when…the impatient Magmar attacks! Everyone thinks it's part of the big show! “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1” is tossed from person-to-person-to-person in the melee. The Knights must do something, but they're too far away from the Fortrex to download any NEXO-Power. Robin pulls up in his Minitrex they can use it to get NEXO-Power! Robin wins the best costume for his Minitrex and wins the Ned Knightly Comic which he then gives to Macy…she deserves to read it.

programme.title: The Drooling Detective
programme.desc: When ruthless dognappers steal Mia's dog Toffee from the Heartlake City Dog Talent Show, it's up to the Friends to play detective and track down the culprits, with the help of an unlikely hero: Stephanie's borrowed sad-sack bloodhound, Benchley. Andrea and her singing dog act, the Howlers, are a sure bet to win the Heartlake City Dog Talent Show – in spite of stiff competition from Tanya's dancing poodle, Olivia's Robo-Dog, and even Stephanie's sad-sack borrowed bloodhound, Benchley. But when an unscrupulous mother-and-son dog-napping team steals the Howlers' best singer, Mia's dog Toffee, it's up to the Friends to rescue him and catch the baddies with the help of the Hero Of The Day – Benchley!

programme.title: Pirates Vs. Ninja
programme.desc: When Garmadon by accident brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty – the ruthless Captain Soto and his Pirates - it is up to our ninjas to stop them from plundering Ninjago City. Sharing a tiny, one-bedroom apartment in the city, the Ninja take Lloyd to Grand Sensei Darreth's Mojo Dojo to begin training. There, they discover Lloyd has all four of their natural elemental abilities. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon discovers his Mega-Weapon can't destroy, only create what the user wishes. By accident, Garmadon brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty: Captain Soto and his Pirates, and they mutiny the ship. Answering the age-old question of who would win a fight between pirates and ninja, it's up to our ninja to stop Captain Soto and his men from plundering Ninjago City. In the end, Ninjago City is saved, the Pirates are arrested and Lord Garmadon escapes once again with their Black Bounty.

programme.title: The King's Tournament
programme.desc: Rival to the King, Jorah Tightwad thinks his knights – the Tighty Knighties – are easily better than the NEXO-Knights, so he challenges King Halbert to prove who's better during the King's Birthday Tournament. It's the King's birthday! To celebrate, the Queen and Macy always throw him a great, big birthday party consisting of a feast on birthday eve and a tournament the next day. At the birthday banquet is JORAH TIGHTWAD (last seen in episode 104.) He's goading the King (and on his birthday, even) and going on and on about how his knights are better than the NEXO-Knights. The King protests, but Jorah asks “How many magical books have your knights recovered? None, zilch, zero.” But he produces the BOOK OF ENVY, which his superior knights captured from Jestro. The next day, the NEXO-Knights square off against Tightwad's four knights: JOUSTING BEEBER, BRICKNEY SPEARS, SHIA LABLADE and THE BLOK. We see that all these knights are envious of the NEXO-Knights: their weapons, their fame, their hair, etc. Macy is also disappointed to find out she CAN'T fight in the tournament – she's agreed to be in “princess mode” for her father's birthday. During the tournament, we see that Tightwad's knights are amazing in fighting contests. They all pair-off with knights who have their same weapons skills. Tightwad makes fun of the NEXO-Knights as his knights do well. Jestro and the Book of Monsters discover that Tightwad has the Book of Envy and he and his monsters attack the tournament. Then we learn that Tightwad's knights might be good tournament fighters, but they can't handle real fights and the NEXO-Knights must save them! Macy is finally able to join in the fight when she sees Magmar show up on the flank. The NEXO-Knights successfully defend the king, but Jestro gets away with the Book of Envy. Tightwad must admit his knights never won the book from Jestro he got the book when Merlok blasted books of magic across the realm. Tightwad's knights all admit that they really admire the NEXO-Knights.

programme.title: Rabbitouille
programme.desc: It's Stephanie vs. Tanya on a TV Bake-Off to end all bake-offs! Stephanie concocts a fabulous cake, and Sneaky Tanya steals the recipe -- but neither knows that pet bunny Daisy has added a secret key ingredient. Will Stephanie's frantic efforts to win at all costs end her friendship with her BFF's? It's Stephanie vs. Tanya on a TV Bake-Off to end all bake-offs! After the duo's rivalry brings Aunt Sophie's Adopt-A-Pet Fair to a disastrous end, a contrite Stephanie wants to make amends with the prize money from a TV Bake-Off show. At home, Stephanie practices baking a delicious cake, and Tanya steals the recipe. But neither girl knows that Stephanie's pet bunny has inadvertently added a secret ingredient, ensuring that no one can repeat the recipe. A frustrated Stephanie freaks out, nearly ending her friendship with the girls – until they discover the bunny's secret and race to help Stephanie win.

programme.title: Double Trouble
programme.desc: When our heroes are invited back to Darkly's Boarding School, they discover it's a trap set up by Lord Garmadon and his evil replica ninjas created by Garmadon's new Mega-Weapo. Realizing how to correctly wield the Mega-Weapon, Lord Garmadon creates evil replicas of the Ninja to face off with our heroes. Meanwhile, Lloyd and the Ninja are invited back the Darkly's Boarding School, only to discover it's a trap and now the bad kids have seized control of the school. With the Ninja trapped in the school with the faculty, things spiral out of control as the Evil Replica Ninja arrive. As an awesome battle takes place in the school halls, the Ninja manage to outsmart their evil versions, and warn Lord Garmadon they're ready for whatever else he throws at them.

programme.title: Monster Chef
programme.desc: Axl and Chef Éclair must enter a cooking contest to try to keep Jestro from getting the hottest chili recipe in the realm. Knighton celebrity chef GOBBLETON RAMBLEY announces that he's developed the hottest chili recipe ever created. Now, he intends to give the recipe to the winner of his “Hottest Chili Cook-Off Competition” cooking show on Knighton TV. He'll turn over his famous Chili Cookbook with the hottest chili recipe on the last page. It's so unique it can't be recreated without it. Jestro and the Book of Monsters think they MUST have that recipe. “Hot chili makes hot monsters!” Merlok knows that this recipe, in the wrong hands – meaning Jestro's – could be dangerous. But when the Knights appeal to the egomaniacal chef, he says the only way to get the recipe is to win it from him. So Axl and Chef Éclair decide to enter. The team that creates the hottest chili will win Rambley's cookbook. Chef Éclair is unsure that Axl has the skills to help them win the competition, but, as we see through funny cooking show bits, Axl is quite good and they become a pretty good team. (We will also learn that years ago, Rambley stole one of Éclair's best recipes and they don't like each other.) While watching the multi-part competition, Aaron and Lance have a contest of their own: who can eat the hottest chili. Axl and Éclair actually win the competition, coming up with a raging hot chili recipe. Before they can claim their prize, Jestro and his monsters attack with Magmar leading the way on his siege tower. They must get that cookbook! During the battle, Rambley's cookbook is accidentally melted. After the battle, Rambley announces his new quest: to make the sweetest ice cream ever! While Axl and Éclair cook happily in the kitchen of the Fortrex, back in the Redoubt of Ruination, Jestro and Lavaria are attempting to recreate Rambley's chili recipe. They keep spooning various recipes of chili into the Book of Monsters. “Nope, not hot enough…waaaay too much garlic….you call that hot?!” (BELCH!)

programme.title: Change Of Address
programme.desc: When Stephanie's mom leaves her in charge of their house for a few days, it's finally Stephanie's chance to prove she can handle responsibility alone. Naturally, everything that can go wrong does go wrong – especially when the entire house disappears! When Stephanie's mom leaves her in charge of their house for a few days, it's finally Stephanie's chance to prove she can handle responsibility alone. But after fending off Andrea's party plans, a Home Alone-style break-in (by the hapless Snivel, trying to retrieve incriminating evidence of the Mayor's latest scheme), and finally the entire house disappearing (“Uh, think Stephanie's Mom will notice?”), Stephanie comes to appreciate that responsibility is a lot harder than it looks.

programme.title: Ninjaball Run
programme.desc: When the ninja learn that Darreth's Mojo Dojo is to be destroyed and Darreth doesn't have the money to save it, our heroes enter the annual NinjaBall Run to win its cash prize in order to save the dojo. As Lloyd continues to train and unlock his hidden powers, the Ninja learn land developers are going to destroy Darreth's Mojo Dojo unless Darreth can find the money to save it. The Ninja decide to enter their Ninja Tank into the annual NinjaBall Run cross-country rally to try to win its cash prize. Revisiting past characters who also enter the race, the high-speed derby will only grow more dangerous as Garmadon enters his Black Bounty, realizing this is the perfect chance to use his Mega-Weapon and rid the ninja. In the end, the Ninja will discover a few secrets within their Ninja Tank, allowing them to beat Garmadon's Bounty by a millisecond and saving Darreth's Dojo with their well-deserved cash prize. And as a final surprise, the Ninja steal back the Destiny's Bounty and make it their own once again.

programme.title: Knight Out
programme.desc: When the other NEXO-Knights decide they need a vacation from Clay, they send him on a holiday not knowing that he's going to a resort that houses an evil book or that Jestro will be heading there, too. Clay needs a vacation. Or, actually, the knights need a vacation from Clay! Clay is so super-focused that sometimes they just can't take it: training, training, maintenance, the Knights' Code tests then…more training. Even Merlok 2.0 is exhausted and he has no physical form! So, the Knights send Clay off on a holiday against his will (arranged by Lance because if there's one thing he can do it's plan a vacation.) But unbeknownst to the other Knights, Jestro and the Book of Monsters are tracking an evil book. A book that they suspect is located near the resort “Exalted Towers” renowned for its exquisite service, where Clay is staying. It's the BOOK OF CRUELTY and Clay notices that it's affecting the “high class” resort where Lance has booked him: the service is terrible, the staff is nasty, and everyone seems to take joy in being cruel to him (and to each other.) Meanwhile, the other Knights are having a terrible time because they realize that Clay takes charge of the basic maintenance of almost everything in the Fortrex. Stuff starts breaking down, chores are not getting done and everyone is getting on each other's nerves. Clay senses things are “off” at the resort, and discovers the book they've been using as the guest register is really the Book of Cruelty. As Clay scoops it up, he looks outside to see…Jestro and his monsters arrive on the Evilmobile. Clay battles as best he can on his own by setting traps and being cunning but he's finally caught. Just when it looks like this will be the cruelest vacation ever the other Knights arrive on their vehicles! They spring into action, free Clay, and battle and defeat Jestro and the monsters – though Jestro escapes. The Knights make Clay promise to never go on vacation again.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.sub-title: Who Do You Think You Are
programme.desc: Rumor has it that Queen Aleena's journals are buried in the city of Tashistan. Sonic and his siblings search the city for the scrolls.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs steal historical artifacts of Mobuis from Robotnik before he can pawn them off at an auction.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A captain of the Queen's guard is captured before he can reach the secret rendezvous where he was to meet Queen Aleena.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The sinister Robotnik blackmails Cyrus, an old friend of Sonic's, by holding his father hostage.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Sonic decides to find Tails a suitable foster home, Robotnik finds out, and creates a robot fox family which poses as Tails' long lost parents. Sonic leaves Tails with the fox family, but finally realizes they're robots and rescues Tails.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: An elderly, out of shape, overweight superhero keeps trying to help Sonic battle Dr. Robotnik, and keeps getting him in more jepordy. Sonic helps the old hero regain his self respect and they team up to battle Robotnik's latest scheme.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: After an accident, Scratch thinks he's an eagle and on the side of Sonic. In order to impress his his new lady love, Scratch assists Sonic in an excursion into Robotnik's Fortress to turn off a dangerous force field.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic turns detective to solve the mystery of his missing Red Sneakers--and just in time to get them back and stop Dr. Robotnik's latest attack on a peaceful Mobius village.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Tails adopts a cute and fuzzy pet named Walter who turns out to be a black hole who sucks up everything in Mobius. Realizing that Walter is from another dimension our heroes have to return him.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Mobius is suffering a crime spree and all the evidence points to Sonic as the culprit. But the real thief is a lab rat wearing a high-tech vehicle suit who was sent by Robotnik to discredit our hero.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Hacker, an adolescent mole computer whiz steals a super-intelligence program from Robotnik's computer, Sonic has to protect him, smashing Grounder to pieces.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic leaves Tails in charge of protecting a squirrel village food supply, when he zips off to stop a dam from breaking. Robotnik sends Scratch and Grounder after Tails.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik installs a new "obedience microchip" in Scratch and Grounder and orders them to drill for a rare mineral in a tropical mountain. With his Freezomatic machine, Robotnik covers the mountain in ice and runs a Hermit out of his home.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic conquers Robotnik's latest evil - a vehicle designated to locate and destroy living tissue matter - during a solo mission to the Badlands. Upon Sonic's return, the Freedom Fighters honor him with a victory party.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang find themselves competing in the Slugball Championship - a rough and tumble cross between hockey, slugslinging and rugby - with deadly random obstacles thrown in for fun! Eli suspects the rival team is cheating, but he's going to have to prove it first... that is if he can survive the game!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang's been captured by the zombifying Mr. Saturday! Locked up in Stalagmite 17, they are helpless as Dr. Blakk begins the trip there to collect them. Only one hope remains... the two members of the Shane Gang Saturday didn't capture: Pronto and Burpy. Can this mismatched pair pull off an impressive prison break?

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang follow Diablos Nacho to Molemound - the Molenoid home cavern. Pronto doesn't want to go - and not because he's in trouble. It turns out Pronto is the rightful KING of the Molenoids. He's been ducking the crown for years since the king's main responsibility is settling arguments and fixing leaky plumbing. But Pronto must play king for a day while the Shane Gang follows Nacho into the great Molenoid library to stop him from taking a valuable map.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Our heroes are lured into an elaborate game by a twisted villain calling himself the Game Master. The Shane Gang must use every bit of skill they have to pass each level, but there is a devious twist: every slug they fire is captured, with the promise that they'll see them again only if they manage to make it to the end. That's becoming all the more difficult with fewer and fewer slugs.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A mysterious creature is draining the energy from all the slugs in a distant cavern, and the residents are offering a rich reward to whoever can stop it. Mercenaries come out of the woodwork hoping for the prize, but the Shane Gang aim to stop it for free. That's what they do. It turns out this creature is more dangerous than anyone could imagine, and one by one, the hunters are taken out of the game-leaving only Eli and the reviled STOCKER remaining.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Dr. Blakk has been captured! Now it's up to the Shane Gang to transport him to Stalagmite 17, the only prison that can hold him. To do so, they're going to need some serious speed. That's just what they get when we reveal Kord's new modifications to their Mecha Beasts! But will it be enough to stand up to Blakk's own newly-designed super vehicles?

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: While the rest of the Shane Gang defend the perimeter from the legions of Blakk Guards sent to free Dr. Blakk from prison, Eli interogates the captured villain. Surprisingly, Blakk feels like talking. He reveals where he came from, how and why he discovered ghouls and most importantly of all, Eli learns the truth about what happened to his father.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Eli's got a new slug recruit! But in the heat of battle, can this rookie go from frightened novice to the hero of the day?

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Dr. Blakk has succeeded in creating a gap in the magical slug-energy barrier that protects Slugterra, opening the way for the evil Darkbane to tunnel their way up from the Deep Caverns. Eli and the Shane gang must stop this at any cost. Now armed with a selection of upgraded slugs, blasters and armor, they take the battle to Dr. Blakk's front door. While his team slugs it out against Dr. Blakk's minions, Eli takes on Blakk himself once and for all!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Eli and the Shane Gang have vanquished Dr. Blakk. But a new threat emerges from beyond the 99 caverns.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Dark Slinger and his marauders have invaded Slugterra! But there's more to this new threat than meets the eye. Eli must fight a very different kind of duel to save Slugterra...and himself.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang and Junjie race across the 99 caverns to keep the Elemental Slugs out of the hands of the Goon.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: To save Slugterra and the Elemental Slugs reaches its climax as the Shane Gang face a final showdown.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: To master the mysterious slug-slinging art of Slug Fu, Eli must train alone with Junjie. That means leaving behind the rest of the Shane Gang-as well as all of Eli's slugs, and the ultra-powerful Elementals! Pronto vows to keep the Elementals safe, but proves so annoying that they run-er, hop-away!

programme.title: Toys and Colors
programme.desc: Toys and Colors teaches kids life skills, letters, numbers, and more – all in a fun and family-friendly way!

programme.title: Ryan's World
programme.desc: Ryan and the gang face off in I'll Buy What You Can Spell, Squishy Vs. Real, and a 24 Hour Challenge!

programme.title: Jason Vlogs
programme.desc: Jason and his family learn to play together in this special that's full of family fun and games for kids!

programme.title: Ryan's World
programme.desc: Head to school with Ryan for a day of DIY crafts and pretend play! Plus, get ready with Gus the Gummy Gator.

programme.title: Ryan's World
programme.desc: Ryan and the Ryan's World crew play Giant Survival in Roblox, Snipperclips, and more!

programme.title: Jason Vlogs
programme.desc: Jason and Alex wash their hands for supper, then dig in to some delicious lessons about healthy eating habits!

programme.title: Ryan's World
programme.desc: Ryan goes on an adventure to Japan with Mommy and Daddy, plus a "yummy" pretend play and more family fun!

programme.title: Kids Diana Show | Princess of Play!
programme.desc: Kid video superstar, Diana, and her brother, Roma, take you along on all their pretend play adventures!

programme.title: Challenge Squad | Ghoulish Games!
programme.desc: Challenge Squad takes on the most epic challenges, featuring your favorite YouTube stars!

programme.title: KidCity | Gummies and Games!
programme.desc: Play along with the KidCity family —Little Flash, Ava, DadCity, and MomCity— in all their kid-friendly games!

programme.title: Ryan's World Specials | H2O So Fun!
programme.desc: Discover how fun learning can be with YouTube superstar, Ryan, and all of his Ryan's World friends!

programme.title: Ryan's World Specials | Day of DIY!
programme.desc: Discover how fun learning can be with YouTube superstar, Ryan, and all of his Ryan's World friends!

programme.title: LankyBox | Ultimate mishmash Vol 5
programme.desc: LankyBox is Roblox superstars Justin and Adam, two best friends who love playing popular video games!

programme.title: HobbyKidsTV | A Slippery Surprise!
programme.desc: Come along for the fun with popular YouTube family, HobbyKidsTV! Plus, HobbyKids Adventures!

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Fishtronaut
programme.desc: The series tells the story of Fishtronaut, a fish in a spacesuit, similar to reverse scuba gear, which allows him to fly and breathe out of water.

programme.title: Sparkle Power
programme.desc: Power through the day with some sparkle and shine!

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Pirate school
programme.desc: On a small remote island surrounded by endless seas, a special Pirate School was opened, where children from pirate families study. Among them are Keel, Fuse and Bobo. The pirate origin does not relieve them from study and normal school duties.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There's just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: The Pirates Next Door
programme.desc: A small town's quiet life is suddenly turned upside down by the arrival of a family of pirates! For Matilda, her new neighbors are a dream come true! With Jim Lad, the Jolley-Rogers' son, around, there's no chance of getting bored.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: It's countryside chaos as Shaun The Sheep returns to the small screen with his very own series. Peace in the valley turns to mayhem in the meadow as Shaun leads his flock into all sorts of scrapes and scraps, running rings around sheepdog Bitzer when the Farmer's back is turned.

programme.title: Future Card Buddyfight
programme.desc: It is the year 2030, and the stage is the capital of Japan, Chou-Tokyo. Through "Buddyfight", humans have started cultural interactions with residents from other worlds called "Affinity Dimensions". Buddyfight is a game with selected humans as the "Buddyfighter", and residents from the other world as the partner (known as "Buddy Monster"). These battles have high significance and sometimes it is even used to decide the fate of a nation, and naturally there are those who seek to use the Buddy Monsters for evil purposes.

programme.title: Hogie the Globehopper
programme.desc: Hogie the Globehopper is a fun tv show that will inspire a curiosity and fascination about the world and its people. Hogie and his friends Lorna, Bernie and Floaty travel the world, making lots of friends along the way.

programme.title: I'll Get You! Holiday
programme.desc: The action takes place in all year round resort, where Wolf doesn't chase Hare to eat him anymore: now it's all about sports and competition. However, in his crazy chase after recognition and victories the grey hooligan often uses methods that aren't really fair, which provokes awkward and funny situations.

programme.title: Hero HQ
programme.desc: Your favorite superhero shows teaming up in one action-packed block that includes: “Pincode”, “Talking Tom Heroes” and “Pumpkin Reports".

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pup Tales
programme.desc: When Mr. Wingnut runs away from wolves that are attracted to his yodeling, he ends up trapped in a canyon. The Paw Patrol has to hurry to save him.

programme.title: Grumpy Greg: Let's Make Music / Circus / Greg's Pool Party / Popcorn / Wake Up!
programme.desc: An unusual sound woke Shelley up from her afternoon nap. It turned out to be Greg playing his harmonica! Shelley wanted him to stop, but he was so happy he didn't pay attention to what she wanted! / Greg was cleaning up his room and found himself really high, he decided to make a little show for his friends! But Shelley also wanted to do some tricks and she with Greg made a real show for Zibidi and Booboo! / On a very hot day Greg felt thirsty, so he went to the kitchen to have some water. But the floor was very hot, it was so hot it burned Greg's feet. So he had to dance across the kitchen to get to the water. / Here comes a new fun cartoon for toddlers! In this episode, we'll see how a small piece of popcorn causes a lot trouble but it all turns out great in the end. One day, a big yummy piece of popcorn fell into Greg's cage. / In this episode, Greg figures out that no matter how annoying your friends might sometimes be, they are still the most important thing a hamster can have. One day Greg was taking a nap. He was really focused on the task, so it was a serious nap.

programme.title: Mush-Mush and the Mushables: SNAILS FOREVER
programme.desc: Chep wants to return a favour to Mush-Mush, but all Mush-Mush wants is to have a compost pancake on Pancake Day! But when the Food Snail falls for, and takes off after, the Travel Snail, Pancake Day h

programme.title: Mr. Monkey, Monkey Mechanic: Mr. Giraffe's Car Is Too Small / Mr. Chameleon's Car Needs New Paint / Mrs. Penguin's Ice Cream Truck Is Too Hot
programme.desc: Today, Mr. Giraffe pays a visit to Mr. Monkey, Monkey Mechanic's garage! Ever since he's been driving his car, his neck has been really sore. Mr. Monkey checks his car, and it turns out it's in tiptop shape! But, Mr. Giraffe's neck is not. It hurts! It must have something to do with his car. So, Mr. Monkey comes up with a plan, which of course, involves his trusty monkey wrench! / Mr. Monkey, Monkey Mechanic is so happy to have his friend Mr. Chameleon visit his garage today! Mr. Chamelon has a special talent, his color changes to whatever he color he's wearing. He asks Mr. Monkey to change the color of his favorite shirt, red. Mr. Monkey happily paints the car. As soon as he drives away, Mr. Chameleon is back, wearing another color and wanting another paint job! / It's a sweltering hot day when Mrs. Penguin drops in at Mr. Monkey, Monkey Mechanic's garage with a big problem - the ice cream in her truck is melting! After inspecting the ice cream truck, Mr. Monkey comes up with an idea and puts his trusty monkey wrench to use. But, is the solution cool enough to keep her ice cream cold?

programme.title: Adventures of ZeZe Zebra: Twinkle Twinkle Little Star / Row Your Boat / Incy Wincy Spider / Mary Had a Little Lamb / Head and Shoulders Knees and Toes
programme.desc: Zeze and her friends star gaze and meet a little star that takes them to the moon. / Zeze and Hip-po row in a boat up a stream and find a Mouse, a Lion, and a Croc. / Zeze and her friends meet a spider and have a nice afternoon tea party, despite all the bad weather. / Zeze wakes up alongside a cute and rebellious lamb who likes bending the rules. / Head and Shoulders Knees and Toes.

programme.title: Pom Pom and Friends: Welcome Pom Pom / Pom Pom Goes to Rainbow Hill / Pom Pom the Hero
programme.desc: When Shawn and Annie aren't able to go out and play due to rainy weather the two wishes for a hero who can help their friends on rainy days.

programme.title: Wonderballs: Balloon Blast / Moving Pictures / Getting into Shapes
programme.desc: Kit and Hugo try to play with balloons but Puffburt keeps popping them. As soon as Kit and Hugo decide to inject a little color into the game, the Wonderballs discover a creative new painting techniqu

programme.title: Caitie's Classroom: Wonderful Wind
programme.desc: Whoosh! Wind is an amazing kind of weather and we have lots of things to explore! Join Caitie in the classroom to experiment with a wind tunnel and see what toys we can blow away using wind. The wind can be used for all kinds of things, like making strange-shaped monsters with paint, and for making electricity on the wind farm we visit on our field trip. It's a windy day inside the classroom!

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies: Funfair ride trap / Labyrinth / How to Cook a Burger
programme.desc: The resourceful Big Gray Wolf prepares a cunning trap to catch the Sunny Bunnies! But the jolly bunnies not only manage to avoid the trap, but also enjoy a happy ride on the carrousel afterwards. / Sunny Bunnies appear in a labyrinth where a terrible beast used to live the Minotaur. Will they find a way out of this mysterious place? / Big Gray Wolf has developed a special device to make burgers from... bunnies! But it's not so easy to catch these fluffy Sunny Bunnies.

programme.title: Mr. Mender and the Chummyjiggers: Toys on Tracks
programme.desc: Ducky Lucky is not very happy with the toy blockage on the tracks. Luckily the Chummies come to the rescue.

programme.title: Meekah: Meekah's Awesome Animal Adventure

programme.title: All The Young Men
programme.desc: While holding position at a mountain pass during the Korean War, a platoon leader is mortally wounded and gives command to an inexperienced sergeant, angering the unit's more battle-hardened soldiers.

programme.title: Hollywood Or Bust
programme.desc: A movie-mad nitwit driving across the country to his mecca, Hollywood, is joined by a gambler who wants to break into singing when they pick up a pretty girl en route. Once in Hollywood, the nitwit meets his dream goddess.

programme.title: The Caddy
programme.desc: In this zany farce, Harvey is a shy but talented pro golfer who, because he can't face the crowds, coaxes his buddy Joe into a big-time tournament. As Joe's caddy, Harvey is a disaster, and the two have a hilarious quarrel.

programme.title: Boeing-Boeing
programme.desc: Boeing Boeing follows the lives of journalist Bernard and his friend Robert. Bernard is juggling romances with three different stewardesses but when Robert comes in for a visit and the airline carriers increase flights to Paris the comedy ensues!

programme.title: Ace in the Hole
programme.desc: A cave collapse traps a man, and all eyes turn toward the tragedy, including those of Charles "Chuck" Tatum (Kirk Douglas), a washed-up newspaper reporter who sees the incident as a ticket back to his former days at the top of the journalism heap.

programme.title: The Palm Beach Story
programme.desc: Money makes the world go 'round, or so Gerry believes when she divorces her husband and marries a millionaire.

programme.title: Break Point
programme.desc: Two estranged brothers (Jeremy Sisto and David Walton) reunite to make an improbable run at a grand slam tennis tournament. The comedy also stars J.K Simmons, Amy Smart, Joshua Rush and Adam Devine.

programme.title: Bakery in Brooklyn
programme.desc: Vivien and Chloe just inherited their Aunt's bakery that has been a cornerstone of the neighborhood for years. Chloe wants a new image Vivien wants to make sure nothing changes.

programme.title: 2nd Date Sex
programme.desc: In hopes of a better relationship this time around, Laura and Ryan are trying to navigate their dating lives. How bad can a second date get? Laura and Ryan are about to find out.

programme.title: Amy and Peter Are Getting Divorced
programme.desc: A seemingly perfect couple are considering a divorce. Their friends are stunned and put everything in place to prevent the breakup of the model couple

programme.title: Daffodils
programme.desc: Leaving her dying father to perform a gig, Maisie explores her parents' heartfelt love and how it all devastatingly fell apart. Told through Maisie's eyes, the love story is expressed with re-imaginings of iconic New Zealand hits.

programme.title: FBI: Negotiator
programme.desc: An FBI agent must negotiate with a woman holding a hospital hostage in order to get her hands on an experimental drug.

programme.title: Love at First Like
programme.desc: A journalist covering the Don Juan of dating apps ends up finding there's more than meets the eye.

programme.title: Food for the Heart
programme.desc: After taking on too much with her meal delivery service, Lia accepts her neighbor Eli's help.

programme.title: You, Me, and that Mountain Retreat
programme.desc: Partnered with nature-hating Nathan, Rebecca is put to the test during a work mountain retreat.

programme.title: Midnight Stallion
programme.desc: JACK and his daughter TERESA train a wild horse in hopes of winning enough money to save their farm

programme.title: Christmas For A Dollar
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, the Kamp family struggles to get by after Mrs. Kamp passes away. The children expect another Christmas without presents until their father brings home one dollar for them to spend on gifts.

programme.title: Angel of Pennsylvania Avenue
programme.desc: Three Depression-era kids ask President Hoover to free their unjustly jailed father (Robert Urich) for Christmas.

programme.title: Northern Borders
programme.desc: Northern Borders is a coming-of-age movie like no other, with Academy Award-nominee Bruce Dern playing a grandfather who takes in his 10 year-old grandson, Austen, at his home in Vermont.

programme.title: Clover
programme.desc: Clover (Zelda Harris) is a precocious ten-year-old black girl living with her widowed father, Gaten (Ernie Hudson), on the family peach orchard in the Deep South. Her aunt, uncle and grandmother all live nearby, so she has never wanted for love.

programme.title: The Dude In Me
programme.desc: Pan-soo, a successful businessman in his 40s, is hit on the ground by a person falling from a building. Waking up, he finds himself in another body. Now Pan-soo has to be Dong- hyun, a high school student who gets bullied frequently. He finds out Dong-hyun tried to help a girl, Hyun-jung, and fell off the building. When he meets her mother, Mi-sun, he immediately knows that Hyun-jeong is his daughter. To get close to Hyun-jung, Pan-soo takes hard physical training with her.

programme.title: A Brand New Life
programme.desc: Jin-hee, aged 9, reluctantly enters an orphanage, struggling with feelings of abandonment by her father.

programme.title: Part-time Spy
programme.desc: Government official goes undercover to a phishing group to retrieve budget, where she meets an undercover cop.

programme.title: What Momma Says
programme.desc: Nearly thirty, Paul Thomas, is still living with his mom. When Paul cannot pay his half of the rent, she kicks him out, forcing Paul to sink or swim when it comes to taking care of himself.

programme.title: When Love Comes Knocking
programme.desc: Veronica Richardson, a girl who has never been with a good man, is caught off guard when true love finds its way to her doorstep. It is up to her if she wants to let it in or shut it out. Damaged and heartbroken from a past childhood friend, Veronica had lost all hope to ever be able to love again.

programme.title: Why She Cries
programme.desc: Sisters are trying to patch up their relationship whilst one is keeping a dark secret from the other. Soon they find out that secrets amongst the average and the affluent are truly not that different, after crossing paths with a wealthy woman dealing with an illness that has caused her husband to be resentful and ashamed of her. Will fate cause them to face the revelation of past hurts and start a journey of forgiveness and healing?

programme.title: The House Guest
programme.desc: A young married couple moves in a female childhood friend who the wife hasn't seen in years. Slowly the house guest starts seducing the ones around her and people start dying. Can anyone stop her before it's too late?

programme.title: The Best Thing!
programme.desc: One day, restaurant owner Justin Alexander's life takes a dramatic turn when he finds out from one of his customers that his deceased ex-girlfriend has a son in the child welfare system. This child is around the age of when Justin and his girlfriend split up. Could this boy be Justin's son? Determined to find out if this kid is his, Justin recognizes being united with this child could have frightening consequences. Or it could be The Best Thing!

programme.title: Avenging Angelo
programme.desc: When elderly Mafia boss Angelo (Anthony Quinn) gets killed in a restaurant, his loyal bodyguard, Frankie (Sylvester Stallone), decides he must protect Angelo's daughter -- high-strung socialite Jennifer (Madeleine Stowe) -- who may also be in danger. Jennifer, however, doesn't even realize that Angelo is her father, as he gave her up for adoption years ago. After Frankie tells her the truth, she sets out to avenge Angelo's death with a very shaky understanding of Mafia protocol.

programme.title: The Alternate
programme.desc: The president is kidnapped while attending a charity event. Initially planned by his chief of staff to boost his poll ratings, one of the kidnappers decides the opportunity for gain is too strong and it turns into a real kidnapping. Starring Ice-T.

programme.title: Train to Busan
programme.desc: As an unidentified virus sweeps the country, Korean government declares martial law. Those on a train to Busan must fight for their own survival. Starring Gong Yoo and Ma Dong-seok. Subtitled.

programme.title: Are You Here
programme.desc: In this touching dramedy, weatherman Steve (Owen Wilson) must join his off-the-grid best friend Ben (Zach Galifianakis) for Ben's estranged father's funeral.

programme.title: Bad Lieutenant: Port Of New Orleans
programme.desc: Terence McDonagh (Nicolas Cage) isn't doing so well. He has a nasty painkiller addiction, courtesy of an injury he sustained while rescuing a prisoner during Hurricane Katrina. Plus, there's his alcoholic father (Tom Bower), boozy wife (Jennifer Coolidge) and prostitute girlfriend (Eva Mendes). And, he's just been saddled with a rookie partner (Shawn Hatosy). Now Terence must pull himself back from the edge of insanity to investigate a series of murders that has the city on edge.

programme.title: The Paperboy
programme.desc: In 1969 Florida, reporter Ward Jansen (Matthew McConaughey) returns to his hometown to write a story about death-row inmate Hillary Van Wetter (John Cusack), who was convicted of murdering a racist lawman. Ward hires his younger brother, Jack (Zac Efron), as a driver and, together with his partner, Yardley (David Oyelowo), gets to work. Though the possibility exists that Van Wetter is innocent, Ward and Yardley unwisely trust a vixen (Nicole Kidman) who will do anything to set the convict free.

programme.title: Danger Zone
programme.desc: Rick Morgan (Billy Zane), an American engineer who runs a mine in East Africa, is approached one day by his friend Jim Scott (Robert Downey Jr.), who needs someplace to store canisters of toxic waste. Unfortunately, a spill occurs a short time later, resulting in deaths and Morgan having to leave the country. A year later, he is approached by a government agent (Ron Silver) looking for a missing supply of potentially hazardous poison, which in truth hides something even more valuable.

programme.desc: Amores que Engañan - La Familia Perfecta: Mariana era una mujer profesionista e independiente, pero a raíz de su segundo matrimonio con Ricardo, deja de trabajar y se vuelve totalmente dependiente de su esposo.

programme.title: El Talismán

programme.title: Eva Luna

programme.title: La Clínica
programme.desc: La Clínica - Fantasías: Pese aparentar que lo había superado, Elvicio no puede sacarse de la cabeza su fantasía de estar con una gemelas.

programme.title: Secretos de Villanas
programme.desc: Secretos de Villanas - S02E03 - Los Hijos son Sagrados: Después de hablar de su experiencia como madres, las Villanas son visitadas por una médium que hace fuertes declaraciones.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Juan organiza una búsqueda por todo el pueblo para encontrar a su hija, pero la policía llega para detenerlo. Sofía sufre al no tener noticia del paradero de su hija. Rosario escucha a Fernando hablar sobre lo que le hizo a Juan.

programme.title: Al diablo con los guapos: Conflictos en casa
programme.desc: Florencia acusa a Mili de querer ser la amante de Alejandro. Damián aclara que no es pareja de Braulio. Braulio se ve forzado a intervenir en el conflicto entre Constancio y Néstor y les pide poner orden entre Luciana y Andrea.

programme.title: Vino el amor: Su lugar de mujer
programme.desc: Graciela se encuentra con Juan. Por otro lado, Luciana le pide a Miguel que la ayude a olvidarse de David.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Remigio le dice a Adolfo que lo va a acompañar por si le falla la puntería. Manuel recibe la carta de Adolfo citándolo y Silvano le dice que no vaya, que tal vez lo quiera matar. Pero Manuel le responde que no hay motivos para temer.

programme.title: Corazón indomable: Entre locura y alegría
programme.desc: El padre le dice a Maricruz que Simona ha perdido la razón y José Antonio por fin le regresa a su hija.

programme.title: Destilando amor: Amante
programme.desc: Sofía se pone muy celosa al ver a Francisco borracho y cree que la engaña, pero él trata de convencerla de que no es así. Sanjuana va a buscar a Hilario, pero él la corre y le exige que se aleje de él.

programme.title: Teresa: Vieja amistad
programme.desc: Luisa se encuentra con Lucía, una vieja amiga de la escuela. Arturo le pide a Jacinto vigile a Teresa para saber si sigue o no engañándolo. Rubén está dispuesto a todo para quitarle su hijo a Esperanza.

programme.title: Rubí: Huyendo del amor
programme.desc: Una vez en la oficina, Rubí no pierde momento para coquetearle a Héctor. Alejandro sospecha que Rubí se trae algo entre manos. Héctor empieza a caer en los juegos de seducción de Rubí y descuida ciertas atenciones con Maribel.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Leonora visita a Sofía para confirmarle que Juan llegó solo y sin memoria al monte. Juan está a punto de ser trasladado a la prisión de Puebla, pero Sofía retira los cargos en su contra.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Angélica encuentra a Renato con otra mujer y borracho el bebé de Angélica sufre un terrible accidente.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Alicia sufre al saber que debe regresar a casa de Soraya. María idea un plan para evitar que Soraya maltrate a Alicia. Nandito enfrenta a Soraya para pedirle que se aleje de su familia.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Soraya planea todo para que culpen a Nandito de la muerte de la Nana Calixta. María se molesta con Luis Fernando porque continúa bebiendo.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: María Mercedes es una pobre joven que se encarga de mantener a su familia. Jorge Luis se casa con Diana, pero a la salida de la iglesia su exnovio le dispara.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Santiago buscará la forma de hacer que Malvina no se quede con todo su dinero después de morir. Meche conoce a Jorge Luis de quién se enamora tras haberle pedido dinero.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Gema le dice a Esteban que solo estará con Arturo si él se comporta como un caballero. Sergio le dice a Bella que sabe que está celosa de Natalia porque lo quiere.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Angélica encuentra a Renato con otra mujer y borracho el bebé de Angélica sufre un terrible accidente.

programme.title: Triunfo del amor
programme.desc: Bernarda le prohíbe a Tomasa decirle la verdad sobre Victoria a Juan Pablo. Osvaldo le pide a Victoria que piense un poco en lo que él quiere frente a la prensa. Max le pide perdón a María, la lleva a cenar y ella decide darle una oportunidad.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Marichuy se cae por las escaleras y queda inconsciente. Ana Julia culpa a Candelaria del accidente, pero Candelaria también la acusa. Patricio se siente mal por la discusión y cae inconsciente.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.sub-title: Ni el tiempo ni la distancia
programme.desc: Patricio sufre una pequeña embolia y pierde la movilidad de un brazo. Por otro lado, Ana Julia se roba el alhajero con las flores de Marichuy.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: El Dr. Durán invita a Juan Miguel a trabajar con él. Cande encuentra el joyero de Marichuy en la basura. Patricio le exige a Marichuy que se olvide de Juan Miguel. Ana Julia se lleva a Mayita sin avisar, dejando a todos muy angustiados.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Ana Julia llega con Mayita y miente al decir que le había avisado a Cande. Las cirugías de Juan Miguel fracasan, pero el doctor Durán le pide que no se rinda. Ana Julia le miente a Juan Miguel y a Marichuy inventando romances para separarlos.

programme.title: Triunfo del amor
programme.desc: María va a buscar a Victoria para pedirle trabajo pero ella la trata muy mal María descubre que Max le mintió y que su nombre no es Fabián.

programme.title: Triunfo del amor
programme.desc: Max sigue a María y le pide perdón por haberle mentido. Milagros ayudará a Nati a encontrar a su alma gemela. Antonieta le pide a María que se aleje de Max pues va a sufrir mucho. Max le dice a María que quiere estar con ella y la besa.

programme.title: Triunfo del amor
programme.desc: María le cuenta a Nati y Linda que Max solo quería tener intimidad con ella, pero que no la ama. Victoria le pregunta a Osvaldo si ha pensado en estar con otra mujer, él se molesta y le dice que no. Victoria se encela de Linda Sortini.

programme.title: Imperio de mentiras: Traición familiar
programme.desc: José Luis traiciona a su familia tras saber que Leonardo será su jefe y lo echa de la casa. Darío le da una sorpresa a Victoria. Renata despierta y puede ver a Elisa.

programme.title: La Gata: Un fuerte amor
programme.desc: Pablo invita a Esmeralda a su casa para que pueda comer algo. Lorenza la humilla y la echa, pero Virginia y Pablo intentan defenderla. Por otro lado, Pablo le dice a Esmeralda que se casará con ella.

programme.title: La que no podía amar: Unión
programme.desc: Ana Paula sufre al saber que Rogelio no la ama. Bruno convence a Vanesa y a Cynthia de unir fuerzas para deshacerse de Rogelio. Rosaura idea un plan para evitar que Ana Paula se vaya de la hacienda.

programme.title: Sortilegio: Comprometedora confesión
programme.desc: Pedro le pide un favor a María José para que Alex contrate a Meche. Victoria se enoja cuando descubre que Bruno le salvó la vida a María José a cambio de la presidencia.

programme.title: Abismo de pasión: Ingrid es enterrada viva
programme.desc: Gabino se escapa del hospital para vengarse de Ingrid. Florencia continúa engañando a todos con su supuesto embarazo.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña: Amor imposible
programme.desc: Sandra y Felipe preparan todo para festejar su boda. Toledo le confiesa a Valentina el inmenso amor que siente por ella. Isabel es acosada por las presas de la cárcel, quienes le exigen una fuerte cantidad de dinero a cambio de seguridad.

programme.title: La usurpadora: Cambio de imagen
programme.desc: Estefanía le confiesa a Piedad que Paola y Willy son amantes. Carlos Daniel contrata a nueva asistente. Toda la familia queda sorprendida con el cambio de imagen de Estefanía.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido: Banda de ladrones
programme.desc: Vitor y sus compañeros confunden a dos huéspedes con una banda de asaltantes llamada la "La Banda del Disfraz", pero resultan ser unos actores de teatro que están ensayando para interpretar a una banda de ladrones.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Vítor y Albertano se emocionan porque participarán en el juego final de su equipo del barrio y les piden ayuda a Natacha y Cuca para entrenar, pues son muy malos jugadores.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Nacho le regala un vestido a Cuca pero cuando confiesa que era de otra mujer ella se molesta. Albertano decide jugar en otro equipo de fútbol por culpa de Vítor.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Carmelo queda encerrado probando la alarma del negocio. María sueña que debe ganarse el corazón de Doña Lucha para conquistar a Albertano, y para eso prepara unos deliciosos chiles, aunque esto despierta un sentimiento de competencia.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: María quiere celebrar su fiesta de quince años, pero para eso utiliza dinero que no es suyo. Doña Lucha entrena al Chino para ser chambelán. Albertano se ofrece a ser el chambelán de María.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: A Renata le encanta espiar a sus vecinos desde la ventana del dormitorio con el telescopio de Justito para confirmar o desmentir chismes. Justito le da clases de regularización a Victoria.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Por unos estornudos de Placido, la Nena será la enfermera encargada de cuidarlo. Mientras, Gaby se convierte en maquilladora y peinadora.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Federica vende zapatos de piel por catálogo y Ludovico se pone muy celoso porque está ganando mucho dinero y decide competir con ella vendiendo ropa interior para mujer, pero es detenido por vender sin permiso.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico y Federica están aprendiendo a usar el chat para conocer gente usando nombres falsos. En el chat, sin darse cuenta. se encuentran entre ellos.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Paco se va de viaje y Fran encuentra la oportunidad perfecta para ganarse unos dólares alquilando el departamento de su papá a unos viejitos por el fin de semana unas horas más tarde el vuelo de Paco se cancela.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Fran acaba de conocer a Karime y se enamora perdidamente de ella. Sólo hay un pequeño problema: Karime se casa el próximo fin de semana.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Los vecinos se quedan sin gas por no pagar su cuota. Luis es el único que paga su parte, e instala su propio tanque, al que Magda le cierra la llave cuando se baña. Lorena extraña a Benito.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Luis estaciona su carro afuera de su edificio y un franelero quiere cobrarle 20 pesos por cuidar su coche. Luis, Arturo y Germán se enfrentan a los cuidadores de carros, pero no logran que se vayan. Los vecinos hacen una junta.

programme.title: XHDRBZ: Los Reyes Magos
programme.desc: Hans Pujenhaimer enfurece al ver que uno de los camarógrafos no hace el conteo debido para empezar la grabación. Sammy y Miguel Luis muestran su nueva "Sección Imposible" con el tema del Día de Reyes.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Santos busca cualquier pretexto para estar cerca de Lupita y ella se pone nerviosa. Mía encuentra a Miguel y Romina juntos en su habitación.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Pilar le llama a Mía de forma anónima para que descubra que Celina le mintió. Mía deja a Miguel afuera de su casa bajo la lluvia.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Sol y Pilar planean incluir a Celina en su nuevo grupo de popularidad. Lupita no quiere que Lola descubra que salió con Santos. Diego golpea a Santos. Sol termina su relación con Diego, y Agustina con Giovanni. José amenaza con golpear a Raquel.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mía ve un video y se da cuenta que Celina le ha estado mintiendo para salir con un chico. León le advierte a Diego que tiene que ganar las elecciones sí o sí, o lo castigará.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mía cuestiona a Celina por no decirle que anda con Alex. Es el día de la votación y gana Diego, pero José está segura de que hicieron fraude. Roberta trata de quejarse pero la castigan y Reverte la consuela, mientras Alma los ve de manera extraña.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Miguel está muy enfermo y Mía lo cuida a pesar de todos los problemas que tienen. Diego engaña a Roberta para llevarla a su departamento y hablar con ella.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Romina se queda a cuidar a Miguel. Gandía pide a Diego, Giovanni y Tomás que encuentren al ladrón de su pluma. Miguel va a la escuela y Gastón lo corre, así que se esconde. Teo va al desfile de las Top Girls y se pelea con José.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: El Coyote queda impresionado al saber que Soledad es el gran amor de Ricardo. Juan decide vivir en la hacienda con Sofía para poder convencerla de su amor.

programme.title: Corazón salvaje
programme.desc: Renato se molesta al ver que Regina está enamorada de Juan. Agustín demuestra que Juan es un hombre bueno y valiente ante el juez. Regina enfurece al ver que Renato le exige al juez una mala sentencia para Juan.

programme.title: Corazón salvaje
programme.desc: Noel le pide al juez que reintegren a Juan a la sociedad. Jimena le cuenta a Mariela los malos tratos que Ángela tuvo con ella. Regina le confiesa a Renato que ya no lo ama.

programme.title: Corazón salvaje
programme.desc: Renato hará hasta lo imposible para lograr separar a Regina de Juan. Juan habla frente al juez para pedirle que haga justicia y lo deje en libertad. El juez declara inocente a Juan de los delitos que se le acusan.

programme.title: Corazón salvaje
programme.desc: Aimeé siente celos al saber que Renato está interesado en Regina. Clemencia le confiesa a Regina que Leonarda es la responsable de la desaparición de María del Rosario. Juan logra encontrar a María del Rosario.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: El Coyote queda impresionado al saber que Soledad es el gran amor de Ricardo. Juan decide vivir en la hacienda con Sofía para poder convencerla de su amor.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Fernando le pide a Gabriela que lo nombre su principal heredero. Juan planea volver a conquistar a Sofía.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Ruth coloca una serpiente en la habitación de las hijas de Sofía. Ricardo intenta abusar de Jimena para llevar a cabo su venganza contra los Elizondo.

programme.title: La agonía de ser madre
programme.desc: Una mujer de mediana edad se entera de que sufre una enfermedad cardíaca y que le quedan pocos meses de vida.

programme.title: Despedida de casada
programme.desc: Unos recién casados deciden divorciarse, pero ninguno quiere mudarse, y deciden levantar una pared en medio de la casa.

programme.title: Bárbara
programme.desc: Una historia de amor donde los enamorados deben enfrentar diferentes contratiempos para poder estar juntos.

programme.title: Tres Noches de Locura
programme.desc: Tres mujeres experimentan varias aventuras diferentes entre sí y algunas de ellas tienen finales trágicos.

programme.title: La Inocente
programme.desc: La historia de una mujer con problemas mentales que tiene que enfrentar un embarazo.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The first episode features the astonishing, ultra-exclusive Ferrari FXX K, tested to the max by Chris Harris at the Daytona circuit in Florida. Matt, Chris and Rory then race across Kazakhstan in 3 high-mileage cars: a Mercedes saloon, a Volvo estate and a London Taxi, all of which have done at least 480,000 miles, the equivalent distance of going to the moon and back. Actor James McAvoy guest stars in the studio and on the famous Top Gear test track.

programme.title: Top Gear

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: During the last stretch of his trip with the 1962 Ford Country Sedan wagon, Tom finds a Pontiac GTO Judge and a '57 Chevy Bel Air convertible.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom discovers two very impressive barn find collections in the Atlanta area. One of the collections has a rare AMC Rebel Machine.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom tours a collection that is wildly eclectic—a place where Tom gets to geek out over Volkswagen Rabbit pickups in the same building as a Daimler SP250.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom takes a quick walk through the shop of Alfa Romeo expert Paul Spruell before dropping in to check on a fellow hunter—one Tom knows pretty well: his son.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom begins his Virginia adventure at Duncan Imports and Classic Cars in Christiansburg, where he gets reacquainted with Gary Duncan, who has imported 4000 right-hand-drive JDM cars since 2016.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: During a visit to San Diego, Tom gets a lead on a couple of unique cars way outside of the city. He and the woody hit the road and arrive at Randy Carlson's house a few hours later.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom sets off in Alaska to check out vintage first-generation Bronco owner Adam McNabb, to discover his collection of various Broncos and assorted off-road delights.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom visits a remarkable motorcycle collection in Staten Island, NY, filled with Harley-Davidson, Indian, and Vincent motorcycles. The collection is so extensive that it overflows from the garage and basement and even finds its way into the living room and dining room of the house. The motorcycles span from 1910 all the way to 1980. We hope you enjoy this once-in-a-lifetime collection.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Ray Evernham shows Tom his incredible collection of his vintage IROC, Stock Cars, and Modified Cars from the early days of racing. He also has a few surprises up his sleeve which leave Tom speechless.

programme.title: The Appraiser
programme.desc: Colin has the pleasure of looking over a rust-free 1966 Dodge Charger from the Arizona desert with all the right factory options.Next, Colin appraises a 1969 Dodge Coronet Super Bee that is an all-original California-built car. Packaged with a 383ci V8 and a factory N96 air grabber hood, Colin thinks this to be an attractive car based on its unique color combo of high-impact F6 metallic green and black interior. But, original cars do come with flaws and Colin found a few in the rear end of the car.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: 90,000sqft or six barns full of dusty, rusty, forgotten treasures from decades of collecting. To name a few, GTOs, Caprices, Firebirds, Blazers, Suburban, Trucks, Jeeps, Broncos, and some pre-war cars. Everything is for sale and everything must go. Message email above, serious inquiries only.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom Cotter gets an exclusive and in-depth tour of the Detroit Historical Society's backroom collection, showcasing priceless Detroit icons. These rare cars are meticulously preserved in climate-controlled bubbles known as car capsules to suspend and slow the aging process so future generations have the opportunity to enjoy them.

programme.title: Will It Run?
programme.desc: The Flathead V-8 in this barn find Ford F1 pickup is FILLED with oil sludge. Can Davin and Jeff get it cleaned out enough to get this beauty of a farm truck running again? BONUS FEATURE AT THE END! Watch an incredible time-lapse rebuild of a flathead Ford V8 engine!

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: This is a story about proximity. Many newly built homes such as semi-detached, town homes and condo units feature designs that share common walls. In the case of our homeowners, Sylvie and Guy, who had just moved into a brand new semi-detached home, they were in for a shock when they realized that they could clearly hear their next door neighbor through the walls! The sound issue was so disruptive that the homeowners were certain moving away was their only option, until Mike and the team found the solution.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Tag along as Mike figures out why an icy townhouse attic is making snow cones.

programme.title: Holmes On Homes
programme.desc: Living in a century home, Kjirsten and John had their bathroom remodeled with a custom slate tile shower, featuring built-in bench seating. Soon afterwards, they notice a strange substance leaching out of the tile grout and that the shower doesn't drain properly. When the bathroom ceiling starts to peel away, they realize something is wrong below the surface. Mike confirms their beautiful looking, new slate shower, is only skin deep.

programme.title: Shotgun Reno

programme.title: Julie Taboulie's Lebanese Kitchen
programme.desc: Julie's falling for Fattoush and you will be too. Her Lebanese peasant-style bread salad is sure to become your new favorite, it's full of flavor and fresh surprises! This spectacular salad is tossed together with Julie's homemade crispy crunchy, toasted-to-perfection pita bread, tossed in Julie's lemony vinaigrette, seasoned with sumac, it's key ingredient, makes this famous salad so satisfying.

programme.title: Julie Taboulie's Lebanese Kitchen
programme.desc: Fresh, flaky and fabulous fish from the famous Finger Lakes region is the catch of the day on today's show inspiring Julie's Lebanese-Mediterranean fresh fish dishes. Translating to "spicy fish" Samak Harrah is one of the most famous fish dishes to hail from Lebanon. Julie's fresh fish, spice and everything nice will reel you in hook, line and sinker!

programme.title: Julie Taboulie's Lebanese Kitchen
programme.desc: Today's show is a special celebration of Julie's favorite season, Spring! This refreshing time of year puts a smile on Julie's face focusing her cooking on springtime offerings. What better way for Julie to cook, create and celebrate this sensational season than with her crown roasted leg of lamb infused with a bouquet of fresh herbs, slowly roasted, makes the centerpiece on the springtime table!

programme.title: Julie Taboulie's Lebanese Kitchen
programme.desc: Julie Taboulie believes that "one dream can the light the world" and her dream to light the world as an ambassador for Lebanese cuisine, culture and customs in America and abroad. Julie's journey, her lifelong work to spread light and love showcasing and sharing her authentic recipes, special stories and hospitality, she warmly welcomes all audiences in the heart of her home, her Lebanese kitchen.

programme.title: Julie Taboulie's Lebanese Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Lebanese Sweets for the Holiday Season
programme.desc: Special seasonal sweets straight from Lebanon and Middle East always signify the holiday season for Julie as she warmly welcomes you into her home for Christmas and the Holiday season. This special show Julie is masterfully making and baking some of the most famous sweets, her personal favorite and most popular requested recipes, Baklawa and Knefeh pastries from Julie's Lebanese kitchen to yours!

programme.title: Cooking with Nick Stellino
programme.sub-title: Chops with Port & Gorgonzola Sauce and Ricotta Cheesecake
programme.desc: Cooking the perfect pork chop and preparing the ultimate sauce with port and Gorgonzola is a easy as 1-2-3! Making the perfect ricotta cheesecake is even easier. Chef Stellino loves to share his tips and techniques with a passionate delivery and easy to follow instructions.

programme.title: Cooking with Nick Stellino
programme.sub-title: Stuffed Meatloaf and Cake with Rum Sauce!
programme.desc: Meatloaf when done right can be a work of art, something worthy of the finest restaurant. It is all about technique and it is never hard to do right. Chef Stellino re-interprets for his viewers a fabulous Sicilian recipe from his youth and in the process he shares with them a series of foolproof techniques for getting done right every time.

programme.title: Cooking with Nick Stellino
programme.sub-title: Pasta with Bolognese Ragu and Strawberries with Zabaglione
programme.desc: The most popular of all pasta sauces finally makes its appearance and chef Stellino is absolutely giddy as he joyfully shares with his viewers his favorite pasta dish from his youth. Simple, easy to follow techniques are at the heart of every success, and to celebrate our good fortune let's all make a fluffy zabaglione.

programme.title: Cooking with Nick Stellino
programme.sub-title: Seared Halibut with tequila and Jalapeño sauce and Risotto with Zucchini
programme.desc: The sauce is the final touch of every prestigious dish that elevates even the most common ingredient to the highest level. Chef Stellino is all bout the details of simple techniques and his teaching style shines with brilliance in this episode, inspiring people to enjoy life with fabulous recipes , simple techniques and common ingredients, even for an aristocratic risotto!

programme.title: Cooking with Nick Stellino

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: Deltas of the World
programme.desc: South of Barcelona lies the Ebro Delta. Its beaches and lagoons are an exceptional refuge for migratory and native bird species. The delta is known for the numerous pink flamingos that nest near the glittering white saltworks. Sea salt is extracted and rice is cultivated in the delta. The impressive lake landscape is endangered to a certain extent by human intervention. For fear of their harvest, some rice farmers take action against flocks of birds. Invasive rice pests are also a threat to farmers in Europe's largest rice growing region. Other problems make the situation more difficult, such as climate change and rising sea levels or dams holding back sediments. What can be done to preserve the unique Ebro Delta?

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Fashion week is just around the corner, but not before the final four designers are surprised with a trip to Rome, courtesy of Best Western. The designers join Tim in a trip of a lifetime, where they gain inspiration for their collections. Later, Tim visits each of the designers at home to check on their progress. The designers then return to NYC and present a preview of their collection to the judges.

programme.title: Project Runway

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: In this season's casting special, "Road to the Runway," sixteen new designers will be introduced with a behind-the-scenes look from their casting auditions, home visits, casting submissions, and sit-down interviews. Tim Gunn will present the designers in carefully carved out categories that will lead you into the season premiere.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: In the season premiere, sixteen new designers meet Tim and Heidi at Madison Square Garden, where they scramble across the seats to gather fabric for their first challenge. In the workroom, they reveal their strengths and weaknesses as they create looks to show who they are as designers.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers are dealt a big surprise in the first Unconventional Materials Challenge of the season! Each designer must create a wearable look using greeting cards as their main textile. Ashley Tisdale joins the judges.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: In the first Team Challenge of the season, the designers are paired up and treated to a day on a Celebrity Cruise ship. For some of the duos, the friendly seas are left behind and they hit some rocky water in the workroom. Tracee Ellis Ross guest judges.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers finally get to go to Mood and they are thrilled! They must put a modern and unique twist on a classic design. Mad Men's Kiernan Shipka joins as a guest judge.
